title: UKAEA privacy notice: Customers, suppliers, partners, 3rd parties
body: "Introduction  We are committed to protecting the privacy and security of your personal information.  This privacy notice describes how we collect and use personal information about you during and after your working relationship with us.  This notice applies to prospective, current and former customers, partners, suppliers and other third parties. This notice does not form part of any contract provide services and we may update or amend this notice at any time.  For more information about our approach to data protection, please see our other procedures and guidance, which can be accessed through our intranet or by contacting the Data Protection Officer: dataprotection@ukaea.uk.  The contents of this privacy notice are overseen by our Chief Financial Officer, whose name and contact details are contained on the UKAEA UK Gov webpage or can be contacted using this email address: dataprotection@ukaea.uk.  Contents   Introduction The kind of information we hold about you How your personal information is collected How we will use information about you Data sharing Data security Data retention Your duty to inform us of changes Your rights in connection with personal information How to obtain more information about your rights Changes to this privacy notice   "
